status.availableNow: Happening now — you can still go
status.missed: You did not participate in the auction

closesWhen.divineBarrier: the player interacts with the gondola for the first time (Step 6), or the player participates in the auction.
closesWhen.hazardShield: the player progresses beyond Step 21, or the player participates in the auction.
closesWhen.sniperShield: the player progresses beyond Step 34, or the player participates in the auction.
closesWhen.dramonShield: the player progresses beyond Step 43, or the player participates in the auction.
